title: Beast-Lord
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|The planet Onderon's Beast-Lords dominate predators with their minds. Direct their actions.|Heljus|<ref name="Codex">{{TORcite|exp=ons|type=codex|Ancient Proving Grounds}}</ref>}}
'''Beast-Lord''' was the title given to the rulers of the [[Beast Riders]] and [[Untamed]] of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]].

==History==
The Beast-Lord [[Kinch Sunka]] led the first attack on [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of Onderon, bringing the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] into a permanent war.<ref name="GAW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref> The most famous Beast-Lord was [[Oron Kira]], who [[Marriage/Legends|married]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Galia]] of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] and united the people of Onderon.

After the Untamed seized the [[Proving Grounds|Ancient Proving Grounds]] from the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], they used the site for trials of Beast Riders interested in advancing to Beast-Lords.<ref name="Codex" />

The Untamed's Beast-Lord [[Brutann]] was a Sith of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], who was killed in the ice planet [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. His brother, Beast-Lord [[Akoru]], led the Untamed on their [[homeworld]].

{{Stub}}
